title: LEGO Star Wars 75419 Death Star Building Set for Adults - Interactive UCS Display Model Kit with 36 Minifigures incl. Luke Skywalker, Han Solo & Darth Vader - Collectible Gift for A New Hope Fans
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: LEGO STAR WARS DIORAMA MODEL KIT – Build the biggest (at launch) LEGO Star Wars building set for adults: the Ultimate Collector Series version of the Death Star, as seen in Star Wars: A New Hope
36 LEGO STAR WARS MINIFIGURES – Including Luke Skywalker (Jedi and Stormtrooper versions), Darth Vader, Han Solo (2 versions), Princess Leia and Chewbacca, plus 2 LEGO Star Wars droid figures
AUTHENTIC DETAILS – The trash chute and crushing trash compactor, functional lift, Emperor Palpatine’s throne room and Imperial Shuttle, tractor beam control unit, Superlaser and much more

RECREATE CLASSIC SCENES – From Luke and Leia swinging to safety from the retractable bridge to the Darth Vader vs. Obi-Wan Kenobi Lightsaber duel, relive every iconic moment inside the LEGO Death Star
STAR WARS GIFT FOR ADULTS – This LEGO Death Star model kit makes a great gift for men and women who are fans of Star Wars, advanced LEGO sets or LEGO Star Wars UCS models
3D BUILDING INSTRUCTIONS – Enjoy every step of your build with the LEGO Builder app; you can zoom in and rotate your model in 3D, track your progress and save all your sets in one place
COLLECTIBLE LEGO STAR WARS SETS FOR ADULTS – From a galaxy far, far away to your living room, LEGO Star Wars sets for adults are designed for people who enjoy mindful, creative activities to relax
description: From the manufacturer The ultimate brick-built Star Wars Death Star Build the biggest LEGO Star Wars set yet: the Ultimate Collector Series version of the Death Star from the classic Star Wars saga. Spectacular LEGO Star Wars set for adults Full of authentic details to recreate Death Star scenes, this display set makes a stunning addition to any fan’s Star Wars collection. LEGO Star Wars Death Star 38 LEGO Star Wars minifigures/figures Includes never-before-seen LEGO Star Wars characters. Crushing trash compactor Relive the dramatic scene when the Rebel heroes were trapped. Emperor Palpatine’s throne room Recreate Darth Vader and Luke Skywalker’s epic Lightsaber duel. Conference room Build the conference room where evil plans were hatched. Hangar bay Prepare the Imperial Shuttle for launch in the huge hangar bay. Working lift Explore every level of the Death Star. Creative gift for adult Star Wars fans Treat yourself or gift this set to another adult Star Wars fan, advanced LEGO builder or collector of LEGO Star Wars UCS sets.
